description: Your AI research assistant that cites real sources and stays honest
name: io.github.zoharbabin/web-researcher-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Search provider: google, brave, serper, searxng, searchapi, duckduckgo, tavily, or exa
environmentVariables.name: SEARCH_PROVIDER

environmentVariables.description: Use multiple search engines with automatic switching if one goes down (e.g. brave,google,serper)
environmentVariables.name: SEARCH_ROUTING

environmentVariables.description: Exa API key (also enables the answer and structured_search tools)
environmentVariables.name: EXA_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Contact email for SEC EDGAR (enables filing_search); falls back to OPENALEX_EMAIL
environmentVariables.name: EDGAR_CONTACT_EMAIL

environmentVariables.description: CourtListener API token (legal_search works without it; a token raises the rate limit)
environmentVariables.name: COURTLISTENER_API_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: FRED API key (enables econ_search for Federal Reserve economic data)
environmentVariables.name: FRED_API_KEY

title: Web Researcher MCP
